search.query: index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (WARN, ERROR, CRITICAL) [| rest /services/search/distributed/peers | fields title | rename title AS host] | timechart span=1h count BY log_level
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (WARN, ERROR, CRITICAL) [| rest /services/search/distributed/peers splunk_server=* | fields host | dedup host] | timechart span=1h count BY log_level
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (WARN, ERROR, CRITICAL) NOT [| rest /services/search/distributed/peers | fields title | rename title AS host] | timechart span=1h count BY log_level
index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level IN (WARN, ERROR, CRITICAL) | stats count BY host, log_level | sort -count | head 20
